title: Accounting safety guard for entries
summary: Block new entries when wallet snapshot is missing or when cash_sol materially exceeds wallet snapshot (drift > epsilon). Replace deployable calculation with max(0, min(cash_sol, wallet_available_sol) - cash_reserve_sol). Surface wallet_available_sol, cash_sol, deployable_sol, accounting_drift_sol, and entries_blocked_reason in cycle summary and entry_capacity_mode_summary. No new external calls; exits/recovery unchanged.
why_safe: Guard affects entries only: exits/recovery logic is unchanged.
No new RPC/Birdeye/Jupiter calls were added; wallet snapshot is already an injected visibility input.
Deployable becomes more conservative and zero when snapshot is missing.
commit_message: Add entry accounting safety guard and truthful deployable
notes_for_cursor: Scope is limited to trader/config plus focused tests and this handoff JSON. Do not add external calls. Do not write doctor output into state.json.
